notes: Round 1 changes_requested. Two issues: (a) contract said '28 names' but actual __all__ has 31 — implementer would silently drop 3 exports. (b) Verify cmd1 grep would pass on a 3-word doc file. Fixed: enumerated all 31 names verbatim, added test_public_api_documented_in_md to assert every name appears as substring in docs/public-api.md, tightened cmd2 to == 31.

Round 2 approved. Both round-1 issues fixed: (a) count drift to 31 verified — Design enumerates all 31 names verbatim, AC and verify cmd2 use ==31; (b) doc-content footgun closed via new test_public_api_documented_in_md that asserts every name in __all__ appears as substring in docs/public-api.md. Verified __all__ has exactly 31 entries by reading calcifer/__init__.py directly.
